since_last: 51% of 85 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.54%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 51% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC -0.53% · Gold -1.25% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 51% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.54%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.54%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.52%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: KLAC is the standout at +9.37%
cards.body: Leaders: KLAC +9.37%, TER +7.82%, CHKP +1.72%, MU +1.58%, CGNX +1.41%. Laggards: WDAY -3.81%, SPCX -1.79%, PUBM -1.77%, RXRX -1.55%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.79% at $181.69
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.79% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
